name: INJ-002
description: A stored payload is returned HTML-encoded by the API to every consumer, independent of what any particular frontend does with it
descriptionHtml: A stored payload is returned HTML-encoded by the API to every consumer, independent of what any particular frontend does with it
statusMessage: INJ-002: the API must HTML-encode stored user content in its responses so any HTML-rendering consumer (admin/reviewer portal, generated document, email, export) is safe regardless of what sanitization does or doesn't happen at storage time. Got raw, unencoded markup: expected [true] but found [false]
